question_text: I have sustainable energy levels throughout the work week.
I am able to maintain a healthy work-life balance.
I feel I can take time off when I need it without guilt.
I have been feeling stressed or overwhelmed in the past two weeks.
options: Not at all | Rarely | Sometimes | Often | Almost always

question_text: My current workload feels manageable.
options: Just right | Slightly too much or too little | Unmanageable

question_text: I understand how my current work connects to the team's goals.
I am clear on what success looks like for my current projects.
I feel our team's priorities are well-defined.
I feel my opinions count when decisions are made.
I have the materials and resources I need to do my work right.
My lead provides feedback that helps me improve.
I feel comfortable raising concerns with my lead.
My lead supports my professional development.
I trust my lead to advocate for the team.
My 1:1s are valuable and well-structured.
I am learning new skills in my current role.
I have access to the resources I need to grow professionally.
I feel challenged by my work in a healthy way.
options: Just right | Under-challenged or Over-challenged | Completely misaligned

question_text: I have a clear sense of my career path here.

I feel safe taking creative risks in my work.
Our team holds itself to high craft standards.
